modules.name: Projects

hook_functions.name: useProjects
hook_functions.description: Fetch all projects optionally filtered by client ID
hook_functions.returns: ProjectWithClient[] - projects with enriched client names

hook_functions.name: useProject
hook_functions.description: Fetch single project by ID

hook_functions.name: useCreateProject
hook_functions.description: Create new project with automatic query invalidation

hook_functions.name: useUpdateProject
hook_functions.description: Update project fields with multi-key invalidation

hook_functions.name: useUpdateProjectStatus
hook_functions.description: Update only project status (onboarding, design_phase, etc.)

fields: project_type: ENUM (branding, ui_ux_design, web_development, seo, google_ads, social_media, gmb, content_marketing, full_service, other)
status: ENUM (onboarding, design_phase, development_phase, deployment_qa, setup_strategy, active_execution, maintenance, completed, on_hold, cancelled)

pages: /clients/[id] - view single client with projects tab
key_calculations: Progress percentage (0-100) stored in DB, set manually
Retainer amount used in MRR calculations (financial_targets)
special_features: Dual engagement model: one-time projects + retainer contracts
Payment split JSONB for flexible billing arrangements
Project progress percentage for manual tracking
Linked to multiple invoices via UUID array (project_ids)
Auto-refresh of MRR when retainer status changes

modules.name: Contracts

hook_functions.name: useContracts
hook_functions.description: Fetch all contracts with optional status/client filters
hook_functions.returns: ContractWithDetails[] - enriched with client & project names

hook_functions.name: useContract
hook_functions.description: Fetch single contract with full details

hook_functions.name: useCreateContract
hook_functions.description: Create new contract

hook_functions.name: useUpdateContract
hook_functions.description: Update contract fields

hook_functions.name: useDeleteContract
hook_functions.description: Delete contract (draft status only, with safety check)

hook_functions.name: useClientContractSummaries
hook_functions.description: Lightweight map for client cards showing 'best' contract status per client
hook_functions.returns: Map of clientId -> best contract status (terminated=0, draft=1, sent=2, signed=3, active=4, completed=5)

hook_functions.name: useUpdateContractStatus
hook_functions.description: Update contract status (auto-sets signed_date when status='signed')

fields: status: ENUM (draft, sent, signed, active, completed, terminated)

key_calculations: Contract lifecycle priority: terminated(0) < draft(1) < sent(2) < signed(3) < active(4) < completed(5)
Auto-set signed_date when transitioning to 'signed' status
special_features: Contract lifecycle tracking (draft -> sent -> signed -> active -> completed/terminated)
Flexible contract_data as JSONB for multiple contract types
Safety check: can only delete draft contracts
Status-aware date management (auto-signs on status change)
Client contract summaries for quick health check
Multi-type support (design, retainer, custom)

modules.name: Reports (Investor Reports)

hook_functions.name: useReports
hook_functions.description: Fetch all investor reports sorted by date (newest first)

hook_functions.name: useReport
hook_functions.description: Fetch single report by ID

hook_functions.name: useGenerateReport
hook_functions.description: Generate new investor report (monthly/quarterly/annual) with complex calculations

hook_functions.name: useUpdateReport
hook_functions.description: Update report metadata (status, sent_to, sent_at, pdf_url)

hook_functions.name: useDeleteReport
hook_functions.description: Delete entire report

hook_functions.name: useSendReport
hook_functions.description: Send report via email + update status to sent

fields: revenue: number - sum of invoice_payments in period
expenses: number - sum of transaction.debit excluding income type
mrr: number - monthly recurring revenue (sum of active retainer amounts)
newClients: number - count of new clients in period
activeClients: number - count of active clients
activeProjects: number - count of active/maintenance projects
outstandingInvoices: number - sum of balance_due for sent/overdue/partially_paid
topClients: Array<{ name: string; revenue: number }> - top 3 by revenue in period

pages: /reports - list investor reports with quarterly/annual pickers
key_calculations: Revenue: SUM(invoice_payments.amount_received_inr) within date range
Expenses: SUM(transactions.debit) WHERE transaction_type != 'income' within date range
MRR: SUM(projects.retainer_amount) WHERE engagement_type='retainer' AND status IN (active_execution, maintenance)
New clients: COUNT(clients.id) WHERE status='active' AND created_at WITHIN period
Outstanding: SUM(invoices.balance_due) WHERE status IN (sent, overdue, partially_paid)
Indian FY logic: Apr-Dec = year-(year+1), Jan-Mar = (year-1)-year
Quarterly: Q1=Apr-Jun, Q2=Jul-Sep, Q3=Oct-Dec, Q4=Jan-Mar
Top clients: aggregate payments by client, sort by revenue, take top 3
integrations: Reads clients for new client count
Reads projects for MRR/active project counts
status_enum_values: draft - report created but not finalized
report_type_values: quarterly - 3 month quarter within Indian FY
form_fields: report_month (required, 1-12 for monthly, 1/4/7/10 for quarterly, 4 for annual)
to: string[] (email recipients, required for send)
special_features: Complex period calculation for monthly/quarterly/annual with Indian FY logic
Automatic data aggregation from 6+ tables
Top 3 client revenue ranking within period
PDF generation and storage
Email sending with Nodemailer/Microsoft 365 SMTP
Flexible report types supporting multiple timeframes
Report data stored as JSONB for archival

modules.name: Expenses & Transactions

hook_functions.name: useTransactions
hook_functions.description: Fetch transactions with optional filters for statement/category/type/search

hook_functions.name: useTransaction
hook_functions.description: Fetch single transaction

hook_functions.name: useUpdateTransaction
hook_functions.description: Update transaction (category, type, notes, reviewed flag)

hook_functions.name: useExpenseCategories
hook_functions.description: Fetch all expense categories ordered by sort_order

hook_functions.name: useBankStatements
hook_functions.description: Fetch all bank statements newest first

hook_functions.name: useUploadBankStatement
hook_functions.description: Upload bank statement and auto-import transactions with auto-categorization

hook_functions.name: useExpenseSummary
hook_functions.description: Get expense summary grouped by category within date range

fields: transaction_type: ENUM (expense, income, transfer, tax, loan, uncategorized)

additional_fields: expense_categories: { id: string; name: string; color: string | null } | null

fields: color: TEXT - hex color for UI
search?: string - matches particulars or category name

key_calculations: Expense summary: SUM(transaction.debit) GROUP BY category_id WHERE debit > 0 AND transaction_date WITHIN period
Auto-categorization: matches transaction particulars against expense_rules using match_type (contains, starts_with, regex, exact)
Period filtering: date range applied to transaction_date for summary
integrations: Linked to invoices (optional FK for reconciliation)
form_fields: transaction_type (optional: expense, income, transfer, tax, loan, uncategorized)
special_features: Bank statement upload with CSV/PDF parsing
Automatic transaction categorization using rule engine
Manual categorization override capability
Running balance calculation from CSV
Cheque number tracking
Debit/credit separation
TDS tracking (separate from transactions)
Project attribution (optional)
Invoice linking for reconciliation
Bulk import (1000+ transactions at once)
Review status tracking (is_manually_reviewed)

modules.name: Services

hook_functions.name: useServices
hook_functions.description: Fetch active services only, ordered by sort_order

hook_functions.name: useAllServices
hook_functions.description: Fetch all services including inactive (for settings)

hook_functions.name: useCreateService
hook_functions.description: Create new service

hook_functions.name: useUpdateService
hook_functions.description: Update service fields

hook_functions.name: useDeleteService
hook_functions.description: Delete service with FK constraint error handling

hook_functions.name: useToggleService
hook_functions.description: Toggle is_active boolean for service

fields: color: string | null - hex color for pill badges
hsn_code: string | null - GST HSN/SAC code

key_calculations: Ordering by sort_order (ASC) for consistent service list display
integrations: Referenced by invoices (invoice_line_items may link to services)
Referenced by projects (project services selection during onboarding)
status_enum_values: is_active: true - service available for use
special_features: Color-coded service pills for visual identification
HSN/SAC code support for GST invoicing
Sort order for consistent UI display
Active/inactive toggle (soft delete pattern)
FK constraint protection (prevents deleting in-use services)
Useful for invoice line item templates
Project engagement service selection during onboarding

modules.name: Targets (Financial Targets)

hook_functions.name: useTargets
hook_functions.description: Fetch financial targets for a financial year

hook_functions.name: useCreateTarget
hook_functions.description: Create new financial target

hook_functions.name: useUpdateTarget
hook_functions.description: Update target values and metadata

hook_functions.name: useDeleteTarget
hook_functions.description: Delete target

hook_functions.name: useRefreshTargetProgress
hook_functions.description: Recalculate current_amount for all targets in FY from live data

fields: target_type: ENUM (revenue, mrr, new_clients, expense_reduction, custom)

pages: /targets - target list with FY picker and refresh button
key_calculations: Revenue targets: SUM(invoice_payments.amount_received_inr) within date range
MRR targets: SUM(projects.retainer_amount) WHERE engagement_type='retainer' AND status IN (active_execution, maintenance)
New clients targets: COUNT(clients.id) WHERE status='active' AND created_at WITHIN range
Expense reduction targets: SUM(transactions.debit) WHERE transaction_type != 'income' WITHIN range
Custom targets: manually set current_amount
Period bounds: monthly (single month), quarterly (Q1/2/3/4 in FY), annual (full FY Apr-Mar)
integrations: Reads clients for new client targets
Displayed on dashboard with progress bars
period_type_values: monthly - single calendar month within FY
quarterly - FY quarter (Q1=Apr-Jun, Q2=Jul-Sep, Q3=Oct-Dec, Q4=Jan-Mar)
form_fields: target_type (required: revenue, mrr, new_clients, expense_reduction, custom)
special_features: Multi-type targets: revenue, MRR, new clients, expense reduction, custom
Period flexibility: monthly, quarterly, annual within Indian FY
Auto-refresh of current_amount from live transactional data
Smart period calculation (Apr-Mar FY logic)
Dashboard progress visualization
Batch refresh all targets in FY
Custom targets for manual goals
Filtered calculation per period (not summing full year for monthly targets)

modules.name: TDS (Tax Deducted at Source)

hook_functions.name: useTdsCertificates
hook_functions.description: Fetch TDS certificates optionally filtered by FY

hook_functions.name: useCreateTdsCertificate
hook_functions.description: Create new TDS certificate entry

hook_functions.name: useDeleteTdsCertificate
hook_functions.description: Delete TDS certificate

pages: /clients/[id]/page.tsx - TDS Certificates section in Overview tab
key_calculations: None - TDS is stored as-is, used for bookkeeping and audit trails
status_enum_values: certificate_received: true - certificate has been received
special_features: Client linking for tax audit trails
Quarter tracking for FY breakdown
Received date tracking
Multiple TDS certificates per client per FY
Notes field for tracking details (UTR numbers, bank details, etc.)
Used in client detail page for tax compliance
Supports file upload (future - currently in component layer)

modules.name: Auth

hook_functions.name: useAuth
hook_functions.description: Get current user + profile + role permissions on mount, subscribe to auth state changes
hook_functions.returns: AuthState with user, profile, role, and permission booleans

fields: user: { id: string; email: string } | null

pages: All protected pages - check useAuth() for role-based rendering
key_calculations: isAdmin: role === 'admin'
isManagerOrAbove: role IN (admin, manager)
isAccountantOrAbove: role IN (admin, manager, accountant)
integrations: RLS policies on all tables check auth.uid()
Role-based access control for all CRUD operations
role_values: admin - full access, user management, settings
manager - can manage clients, projects, contracts
accountant - can manage invoices, payments, transactions
special_features: Automatic profile creation on auth signup
Real-time auth state subscription
Role-based permission helpers
Loading state for async auth
Integrates with Supabase RLS for security

modules.name: Dashboard
data_dependencies: useDashboardKPIs() - returns { revenue, collections, mrr, activeClients, activeProjects }
sections: Targets Progress - active targets with bars
key_calculations: formatRevenue() - converts large numbers to K/L format
urgency classification - overdue/due_soon/upcoming based on days_label
target progress % - current_amount / target_amount * 100
special_features: Real-time KPI display
Attention items sorted by urgency
Quick invoice creation modal
Mobile responsive (hidden chart on small screens)
Color-coded urgency indicators
Floating action button for quick onboarding

modules.name: Pipeline
components: NewInvoiceModal - create invoice from scheduled item
sections: Revenue Projection Chart - scheduled invoices grouped by month
Overdue Collections - overdue invoices needing payment
Due Soon - invoices due within 7 days
Upcoming Invoices - scheduled invoices to be generated
Invoice Generation - mark scheduled items as generated/skipped
key_calculations: Chart data: group scheduled_invoices by billing_month, SUM amounts
Urgency grouping: overdue/due_soon/upcoming based on expected_payment_date
Days remaining: expected_payment_date - today
special_features: Visual revenue projection
Drag-and-drop invoice generation (future)
Quick invoice creation from scheduled items
Mark scheduled items as generated/skipped
Client linking for quick access

modules.name: Onboard
components: Step 1: Client Details (company info, address, signing authority, contacts)

company_info: region (required: india, usa, uae, uk, other)
currency (required: INR, USD, AED, GBP, EUR)

validation_rules: e.preventDefault() on all forms - must validate manually
special_features: Multi-step wizard (3 steps)
Step indicator with checkmarks
Client details persistence across steps
Service selection per engagement
Multiple engagement types (one-time + retainer)
Automatic scheduled invoice creation post-setup

modules.name: Settings
components: Tab 1: Company - company settings (name, logo, address)
Tab 2: Bank Details - bank account info
Tab 3: Invoice - invoice numbering sequence, payment terms
Tab 5: Email Templates - CRUD for email templates (future)
Tab 7: Users - team member management + roles

tabs.label: Users
features: Change user role (admin, manager, accountant, viewer)

tabs.label: Notifications
features: Notification triggers (invoice overdue, payment received, etc.)

special_features: Rich text editor for email templates (future)
Service color picker for visual identification
HSN code lookup (future integration)
User role management with permission matrix
Settings persist to localStorage for quick access
Real-time updates on service changes

key_integrations.dashboard: Central hub for KPIs, attention items, payments, targets, pipeline
key_integrations.pipeline: Revenue projection + collections + scheduled invoice generation
key_integrations.settings: Configuration for services, users, company, invoice rules
key_integrations.projects: Core business unit, linked to contracts, invoices, targets
key_integrations.contracts: Legal framework for projects, lifecycle tracking

business_logic_patterns: Indian FY logic (Apr-Mar) across reports and targets
Multi-currency support (INR, USD, AED, GBP, EUR)
Role-based access control (admin, manager, accountant, viewer)
State management: TanStack Query (server state) + Zustand (UI state)
Auto-categorization of transactions via rule engine
Real-time KPI calculations from transactional data
